debug_info.goal:
k G : Type u
inst✝³ : CommRing k
inst✝² : Group G
M : Rep k G
M_ : ℕ → Subrep M
inst✝¹ inst✝ : IsFilterComplete M_
q : ℕ
⊢ IsFilterComplete fun i => @Subrep.toCocycles k G inst✝³ inst✝² M (M_ i) q

failed_attempts:
IsFilterComplete.ker (fun i ↦ (M_ i).toCochains q) (fun i ↦ (M_ i).toCochains (q + 1))
    ((inhomogeneousCochains M).d q (q + 1)) fun i x hx g ↦
    (M_ i).toSubmodule.sum_mem fun _ _ ↦ (M_ i).ρ_mem _ (hx _)

IsFilterComplete.ker (fun i ↦ (M_ i).toCochains q) (fun i ↦ (M_ i).toCochains (q + 1))
    ((inhomogeneousCochains M).d q) fun i ↦ (M_ i).toCochains_d q

IsFilterComplete.ker (fun i ↦ (M_ i).toCochains q) (fun i ↦ (M_ i).toCochains (q + 1))
    ((inhomogeneousCochains M).d q) fun i x hx ↦ by
      let y : (inhomogeneousCochains (M_ i)).X q := fun g ↦ ⟨x g, hx g⟩
      have hx : x = (inhomogeneousCochains.map (M_ i).incl).f q y := rfl
      rw [hx, ← (inhomogeneousCochains.map (M_ i).incl).comm q (q + 1)]
      exact Submodule.mem_pi.2 fun _ ↦ ⟨_, rfl⟩
